description: DAPPLE (Disease Association Protein-Protein Link Evaluator) looks for significant physical connectivity among proteins encoded for by genes in loci associated to disease according to protein-protein interactions reported in the literature.
author: Lizzy Rossin, Heiko Horn
plan:
## DAPPLE GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
DAPPLE is a GenePattern module that DAPPLE (Disease Association Protein-Protein Link Evaluator) looks for significant physical connectivity among proteins encoded for by genes in loci associated to disease according to protein-protein interactions reported in the literature.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 7 parameters:
- Required: Input.File, Permute.Length, genome.build, Keyword
- Optional: Plot, nearest.gene, Seed

### 3. Command Line
```
python /code/BuildNetwork_slowTMP.py <Input.File> keyword\=<Keyword> permute\=<Permute.Length> plot\=<Plot> genome\=<genome.build> nearestgene\=<nearest.gene>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/dapple\:v0.19-pre.4

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation
command_line: python /code/BuildNetwork_slowTMP.py <Input.File> keyword=<Keyword> permute=<Permute.Length> plot=<Plot> genome=<genome.build> nearestgene=<nearest.gene>

parameters.name: Input.File
parameters.description: File containing a list of SNPs, genes or regions. Each input should be on a new line.

parameters.name: Permute.Length
parameters.description: To increase speed, this is adaptive permutation (see README)

parameters.name: nearest.gene
parameters.description: Do you want to use the gene nearest to the SNP (rather than grabbing all genes in the LD wingspan)? Only relevant for SNP inputs.

parameters.name: genome.build
parameters.description: Which set of SNPs should we use? hg18, hg19, 1KG?

parameters.name: Seed
parameters.description: For reproducible runs, please specify a seed [integer] for randomization
